//: Template: copy into an Android project's .claude/settings.json. The verification-loop automation the ADLC plan calls for. SAFE: the allowlist contains only local/read-only commands (no outbound; outbound actions still require the operator's explicit yes first).
//hooks: Auto-format Kotlin after an edit. Claude Code passes hook data as JSON on stdin (the tool_input.file_path field), NOT via a $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT env var (which does not exist). The hook below reads stdin and runs spotless only when a .kt file was edited.

hooks.command: f=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in *.kt) ./gradlew spotlessApply -q >/dev/null 2>&1 ;; esac; exit 0
